children.heading: Limitation on administrative expenses
children.label: a Limitation on administrative expenses
children.text: The Secretary may not make a grant under to a State unless the State agrees that not more than 10 percent of the grant will be expended for administrative expenses with respect to the grant.section 280c(a) of this title

children.heading: Description of intended use of grant
children.label: b Description of intended use of grant

children.text: the State submits to the Secretary a description of the purposes for which the State intends to expend the grant; and

children.label: A
children.text: the number of individuals who will receive services pursuant to and the average costs of providing such services to each such individual; andsection 280c(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a description of the manner in which such programs and activities will be coordinated with any similar programs and activities of public and private entities.
contain the description of intended expenditures required in subsection (b);
with respect to carrying out the purpose for which the grant is to be made, provide assurances of compliance satisfactory to the Secretary; and
otherwise be in such form, be made in such manner, and contain such information and agreements as the Secretary determines to be necessary to carry out this subpart.

children.heading: Evaluations and report by Secretary
children.label: d Evaluations and report by Secretary

children.text: provide for an evaluation of each demonstration project for which a grant is made under ; andsection 280c(a) of this title
not later than 6 months after the completion of such evaluations, submit to the Congress a report describing the findings made as a result of the evaluations.

children.heading: Authorizations of appropriations
children.label: e Authorizations of appropriations
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out this subpart, there are authorized to be appropriated $5,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1988 through 1990, $7,500,000 for fiscal year 1991, and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1992 and 1993.
